text:
Hi,

   Sorry, but I have not how to test it, because I'm without box FreeBSD.

Sylvio

> Synopsis: /usr/ports/net-mgmt/py-yapsnmp fails

> Responsible-Changed-Why:
> Hello Sylvio,
>
> The error message
> /usr/local/lib/libnetsnmp.so: undefined reference to `__stack_chk_fail_lo=
cal'
>
> looks to me, as if there is something wrong with libnetsnmp on i386.
> Can you take a look at this?
>
>
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D152374
>
